skills.name: 仁德
skills.desc: 回合结束时，为周围方形2格内友军回复20生命
skills.contentCode: const g = global.Game; if (!g) return; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 2, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: true }); let n = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = g.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side === actor.side) { Effect.heal(t, 20); n++; } } if (n > 0) g.log('【仁德】' + actor.name + ' 为 ' + n + ' 名友军恢复生命。', 'turn');

skills.name: 奔袭
skills.desc: 选择十字5格内空格瞬移，瞬移后本回合可再次行动
skills.contentCode: const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 5 }, mustEmpty: true, passThrough: true, hintText: "【奔袭】选择瞬移目标位置" }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.teleport(actor, cell.x, cell.y); Effect.resetAction(actor); return true;

skills.name: 铁骑
skills.desc: 移动后，周围十字1格内敌人受到20点伤害
skills.contentCode: const g = global.Game; if (!g) return; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('+', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hit = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = g.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, 20, { ignoreDef: true }); hit++; } } if (hit > 0) g.log('【铁骑】' + actor.name + ' 冲击造成 ' + hit + ' 人受伤！');

skills.name: 八风
skills.desc: 对周围方形2格内所有敌人造成1.2倍伤害
skills.contentCode: actor.skilled = true; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 2, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hits = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = global.Game.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.2 }); hits++; } } global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 发动【八风】，横扫 ' + hits + ' 人！'); return hits > 0;

skills.name: 百步
skills.desc: 选择方形4格内敌人，造成2倍伤害无视防御
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 4 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【百步】选择射击目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; const dmg = Math.floor(Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor) * 2); Effect.damage(actor, target, dmg, { ignoreDef: true }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 百步穿杨！'); return true;

skills.name: 老当
skills.desc: 被攻击时，攻击提升30持续1回合
skills.contentCode: actor.atkBuff = (actor.atkBuff || 0) + 30; actor.atkBuffTurns = 1; if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【老当】' + actor.name + ' 怒火中烧，攻击+30！');

skills.name: 神通
skills.desc: 选择十字3格内敌人，造成1.5倍伤害并眩晕1回合
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【神通】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.5 }); if (target.alive) Effect.stun(target, 1); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 发动神通！'); return true;

skills.name: 聚气
skills.desc: 回合开始时获得20护盾
skills.contentCode: Effect.shield(actor, 20);

skills.name: 落凤
skills.desc: 选择方形2格内位置，引发爆炸造成60伤害
skills.contentCode: const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 2 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【落凤】选择爆炸位置' }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; const result = Effect.explode(actor, cell.x, cell.y, 1, 60, { ignoreDef: true, shape: 'r' }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 发动落凤，命中 ' + result.hits + ' 人！'); return true;

skills.name: 妙计
skills.desc: 每次使用技能后，恢复30生命
skills.contentCode: Effect.heal(actor, 30);

skills.name: 龙争
skills.desc: 选择十字4格内敌人，造成1.8倍伤害
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 4 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【龙争】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.8 }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 龙争虎斗！'); return true;

skills.name: 战意
skills.desc: 击杀敌人后，下回合攻击力+40
skills.contentCode: actor.atkBuff = (actor.atkBuff || 0) + 40; actor.atkBuffTurns = 2; if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【战意】' + actor.name + ' 越战越勇，攻击+40！');

skills.name: 奸雄
skills.desc: 受到攻击时，50%概率恢复20生命
skills.contentCode: if (Effect.chance(0.5)) { Effect.heal(actor, 20); if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【奸雄】' + actor.name + ' 化险为夷！'); }

skills.name: 雄霸
skills.desc: 选择方形3格内敌人，造成1.5倍伤害并嘲讽2回合
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【雄霸】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.5 }); Effect.taunt(target, 2); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 雄霸天下！'); return true;

skills.name: 狂虎
skills.desc: 对周围方形1格内敌人造成2倍伤害
skills.contentCode: actor.skilled = true; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hits = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = global.Game.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 2 }); hits++; } } global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 狂虎下山！'); return hits > 0;

skills.name: 坚营
skills.desc: 回合开始时防御+20
skills.contentCode: actor.defBuff = (actor.defBuff || 0) + 20; actor.defBuffTurns = 1; if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【坚营】' + actor.name + ' 防御+20！');

skills.name: 快击
skills.desc: 选择十字3格内敌人，造成1.3倍伤害且无视防御
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【快击】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Math.floor(Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor) * 1.3), { ignoreDef: true }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 神速一击！'); return true;

skills.name: 神机
skills.desc: 回合开始时获得30%闪避率
skills.contentCode: Effect.dodge(actor, 0.3);

skills.name: 耀武
skills.desc: 选择十字4格内敌人，造成1.6倍伤害并击退2格
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 4 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【耀武】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.6 }); const dir = [Math.sign(target.x - actor.x) || 1, Math.sign(target.y - actor.y) || 0]; Effect.push(actor, target, dir, 2); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 耀武扬威！'); return true;

skills.name: 止防
skills.desc: 攻击时，目标防御归零1回合
skills.contentCode: if (context && context.target) { Effect.mark(context.target, 'zhifang', { display: '止', modifiers: { zeroDef: true }, data: { turns: 1 } }); }

skills.name: 快步
skills.desc: 瞬移至十字5格内空格，瞬移后可攻击
skills.contentCode: const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 5 }, mustEmpty: true, passThrough: true, hintText: '【快步】选择目标位置' }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.teleport(actor, cell.x, cell.y); actor.attacked = false; return true;

skills.name: 双截
skills.desc: 选择十字2格内敌人，连续攻击2次
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 2 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【双截】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor)); if (target.alive) Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor)); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 双截棍法！'); return true;

skills.name: 深策
skills.desc: 选择方形3格内敌人，造成100伤害并中毒2回合
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【深策】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, 100, { ignoreDef: true }); Effect.poison(target, 25, 2); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 深谋远虑！'); return true;

skills.name: 连环
skills.desc: 击杀敌人后，技能冷却-1
skills.contentCode: Effect.reduceAllCooldowns(actor, 1); if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【连环】' + actor.name + ' 技能冷却减少！');

skills.name: 坚固
skills.desc: 获得80护盾，持续2回合
skills.contentCode: actor.skilled = true; Effect.shield(actor, 80); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 铜墙铁壁！'); return true;

skills.name: 震杀
skills.desc: 对周围方形1格内敌人造成1.5倍伤害并眩晕1回合
skills.contentCode: actor.skilled = true; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hits = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = global.Game.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.5 }); if (t.alive) Effect.stun(t, 1); hits++; } } global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 震杀四方！'); return hits > 0;

skills.name: 霸王
skills.desc: 选择十字2格内敌人，造成2.5倍伤害
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 2 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【霸王】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 2.5 }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 霸王之力！'); return true;

skills.name: 铁壁
skills.desc: 被攻击时反弹20伤害
skills.contentCode: if (context && context.attacker && context.attacker.alive) { Effect.damage(actor, context.attacker, 20, { ignoreDef: true }); }

skills.name: 冲锋
skills.desc: 瞬移至十字5格内空格，落地后对周围敌人造成30伤害
skills.contentCode: const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 5 }, mustEmpty: true, passThrough: true, hintText: '【冲锋】选择目标位置' }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.teleport(actor, cell.x, cell.y); const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hits = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = global.Game.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, 30, { ignoreDef: true }); hits++; } } global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 冲锋陷阵，命中 ' + hits + ' 人！'); return true;

skills.name: 武勇
skills.desc: 击杀敌人后，攻击+20
skills.contentCode: actor.atkBuff = (actor.atkBuff || 0) + 20; if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【武勇】' + actor.name + ' 越战越勇！');

skills.name: 龙令
skills.desc: 选择方形3格内友军，恢复50生命并加30护盾
skills.contentCode: const ally = await Effect.chooseAlly(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【龙令】选择友军' }); if (!ally) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.heal(ally, 50); Effect.shield(ally, 30); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 龙令赐福！'); return true;

skills.name: 福人
skills.desc: 回合开始时，周围友军恢复15生命
skills.contentCode: const g = global.Game; if (!g) return; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 2, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: true }); let n = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = g.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side === actor.side) { Effect.heal(t, 15); n++; } } if (n > 0) g.log('【福人】' + actor.name + ' 惠及 ' + n + ' 人。', 'turn');

skills.name: 杀神
skills.desc: 选择十字4格内敌人，造成2倍伤害
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 4 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【杀神】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 2 }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 杀神降临！'); return true;

skills.name: 隐袭
skills.desc: 攻击时50%概率造成额外30伤害
skills.contentCode: if (context && context.target && context.target.alive && Effect.chance(0.5)) { Effect.damage(actor, context.target, 30, { ignoreDef: true }); if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【隐袭】' + actor.name + ' 暗中一击！'); }

skills.name: 连击
skills.desc: 选择十字3格内敌人，连续攻击2次
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【连击】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor)); if (target.alive) Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor)); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 连珠炮！'); return true;

skills.name: 忠诚
skills.desc: 被攻击时，攻击者被击退1格
skills.contentCode: if (context && context.attacker && context.attacker.alive) { const dir = [Math.sign(context.attacker.x - actor.x) || 1, Math.sign(context.attacker.y - actor.y) || 0]; Effect.push(actor, context.attacker, dir, 1); }

skills.name: 鲨鱼
skills.desc: 攻击时回复造成伤害30%的生命
skills.contentCode: if (context && context.damage && context.damage > 0) { const heal = Math.floor(context.damage * 0.3); Effect.heal(actor, heal); }

skills.name: 坚韧
skills.desc: 受到治疗时，防御+10持续2回合
skills.contentCode: actor.defBuff = (actor.defBuff || 0) + 10; actor.defBuffTurns = 2;

skills.name: 蒙蔽
skills.desc: 选择方形2格内敌人，使其冻结2回合
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 2 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【蒙蔽】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.freeze(target, 2); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 蒙蔽敌军！'); return true;

skills.name: 探城
skills.desc: 瞬移至十字5格内空格，瞬移后本回合可再次移动
skills.contentCode: const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 5 }, mustEmpty: true, passThrough: true, hintText: '【探城】选择目标位置' }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.teleport(actor, cell.x, cell.y); actor.moved = false; return true;

skills.name: 焚烈
skills.desc: 选择方形3格内位置，引爆火焰造成50伤害
skills.contentCode: const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【焚烈】选择目标位置' }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; const result = Effect.explode(actor, cell.x, cell.y, 1, 50, { ignoreDef: true, shape: 'r' }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 火烧连营！'); return true;

skills.name: 回变
skills.desc: 回合结束时，移除自身所有负面标记
skills.contentCode: Effect.unmarkAll(actor); if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【回变】' + actor.name + ' 净化自身！', 'turn');

skills.name: 汇合
skills.desc: 选择方形3格内友军，与其交换位置并各恢复30生命
skills.contentCode: const ally = await Effect.chooseAlly(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【汇合】选择友军' }); if (!ally) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.swap(actor, ally); Effect.heal(actor, 30); Effect.heal(ally, 30); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 与 ' + ally.name + ' 汇合！'); return true;

skills.name: 固本
skills.desc: 回合开始时，若生命值低于50%则恢复30生命
skills.contentCode: if (actor.hp < actor.maxHp * 0.5) { Effect.heal(actor, 30); if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【固本】' + actor.name + ' 恢复生命！'); }

skills.name: 无双
skills.desc: 对周围方形1格内所有敌人造成2倍伤害并击退2格
skills.contentCode: actor.skilled = true; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hits = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = global.Game.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 2 }); const dir = [Math.sign(c.x - actor.x) || 0, Math.sign(c.y - actor.y) || 0]; Effect.push(actor, t, dir, 2); hits++; } } global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 发动无双！'); return hits > 0;

skills.name: 飞将
skills.desc: 回合开始时，若周围无友军则攻击+40并获得30护盾
skills.contentCode: const g = global.Game; if (!g) return; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 2, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hasAlly = false; for (const c of cells) { const p = g.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (p && p.alive && p.side === actor.side) { hasAlly = true; break; } } if (!hasAlly) { actor.atkBuff = (actor.atkBuff || 0) + 40; actor.atkBuffTurns = 1; Effect.shield(actor, 30); g.log('【飞将】' + actor.name + ' 孤军奋战！', 'turn'); }

skills.name: 常胜
skills.desc: 击杀敌人后，恢复本回合移动与攻击权限
skills.contentCode: Effect.resetAction(actor);

skills.name: 胆勇
skills.desc: 选择十字4格内敌人，瞬移至其周围空格并造成40伤害
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 4 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【胆勇】选择敌人' }); if (!target) return false; const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { center: { x: target.x, y: target.y }, range: { shape: "r", n: 2 }, mustEmpty: true, passThrough: true, hintText: '【胆勇】选择落点' }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.teleport(actor, cell.x, cell.y); Effect.damage(actor, target, 40, { ignoreDef: true }); return true;

skills.name: 威震
skills.desc: 回合结束时，对周围方形1格内敌人施加威标记（被攻击时防御归零）
skills.contentCode: const g = global.Game; if (!g) return; const enemies = g.pieces.filter(p => p.alive && p.side !== actor.side); enemies.forEach(e => Effect.unmark(e, 'wei')); const inRange = Range.cellsInRange('square', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let marked = 0; for (const c of inRange) { const t = g.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.mark(t, 'wei', { display: '威', modifiers: { zeroDef: true } }); marked++; } } if (marked > 0) g.log('【威震】' + actor.name + ' 震慑 ' + marked + ' 人！', 'turn');

skills.name: 八步
skills.desc: 选择十字3格内敌人，造成1.8倍伤害
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【八步】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.8 }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 八步威震！'); return true;

skills.name: 咆哮
skills.desc: 对十字2格内敌人造成1.5倍伤害并眩晕1回合
skills.contentCode: actor.skilled = true; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('+', 2, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hits = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = global.Game.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.5 }); if (t.alive) Effect.stun(t, 1); hits++; } } global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 咆哮震天！'); return hits > 0;

skills.name: 燕人
skills.desc: 被攻击后，若血量低于50%则攻击+30
skills.contentCode: if (actor.hp < actor.maxHp * 0.5) { actor.atkBuff = (actor.atkBuff || 0) + 30; actor.atkBuffTurns = 1; if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【燕人】' + actor.name + ' 怒气爆发！'); }

skills.name: 火攻
skills.desc: 选择方形3格内位置，引爆火焰造成60伤害
skills.contentCode: const cell = await Effect.chooseCell(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【火攻】选择目标位置' }); if (!cell) return false; actor.skilled = true; const result = Effect.explode(actor, cell.x, cell.y, 1, 60, { ignoreDef: true, shape: 'r' }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 火攻！'); return true;

skills.name: 空城
skills.desc: 回合开始时获得40%闪避率
skills.contentCode: Effect.dodge(actor, 0.4);

skills.name: 离间
skills.desc: 选择方形2格内敌人，使其魅惑2回合
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 2 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【离间】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.charm(actor, target, 2); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 离间计！'); return true;

skills.name: 倾国
skills.desc: 回合结束时，周围敌人35%概率被眩晕
skills.contentCode: const g = global.Game; if (!g) return; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let stunned = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = g.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { if (Effect.chance(0.35)) { Effect.stun(t, 1); stunned++; } } } if (stunned > 0) g.log('【倾国】' + actor.name + ' 魅惑 ' + stunned + ' 人！', 'turn');

skills.name: 烽火
skills.desc: 选择十字3格内敌人，造成80伤害并拉向自己2格，回复40生命
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: "+", n: 3 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【烽火】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.leech(actor, target, 80, { ignoreDef: true, leechRatio: 0.5 }); if (target.alive) Effect.pull(actor, target, 2); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 烽火连天！'); return true;

skills.name: 英姿
skills.desc: 回合开始时恢复25生命并获得20护盾
skills.contentCode: Effect.heal(actor, 25); Effect.shield(actor, 20);

skills.name: 霸气
skills.desc: 对周围方形2格内敌人造成1.5倍伤害并嘲讽2回合
skills.contentCode: actor.skilled = true; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 2, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); let hits = 0; for (const c of cells) { const t = global.Game.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.damage(actor, t, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.5 }); Effect.taunt(t, 2); hits++; } } global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 霸气外露！'); return hits > 0;

skills.name: 恶政
skills.desc: 回合结束时，周围敌人中毒1回合
skills.contentCode: const g = global.Game; if (!g) return; const cells = Range.cellsInRange('square', 1, actor.x, actor.y, { includeSelf: false }); for (const c of cells) { const t = g.pieceAt(c.x, c.y); if (t && t.alive && t.side !== actor.side) { Effect.poison(t, 20, 1); } }

skills.name: 元氏
skills.desc: 选择方形4格内敌人，造成1.3倍伤害
skills.contentCode: const target = await Effect.chooseEnemy(actor, { range: { shape: 'square', n: 4 }, passThrough: true, hintText: '【元氏】选择目标' }); if (!target) return false; actor.skilled = true; Effect.damage(actor, target, Effect.getEffectiveAttack(actor), { mul: 1.3 }); global.Game.log(actor.name + ' 元氏雄风！'); return true;

skills.name: 群连
skills.desc: 击杀敌人后，所有友军恢复20生命
skills.contentCode: const allies = Effect.getAllies(actor); allies.forEach(a => Effect.heal(a, 20)); if (global.Game) global.Game.log('【群连】' + actor.name + ' 击杀后全体回复！');
